hero.title: Join the Brotherhood
hero.description: Admission to Dale College is a commitment to excellence. We are looking for young men who are ready to embrace our values and contribute to our legacy.

steps.title: Application
steps.description: Complete the online form or download the PDF application. Ensure all supporting documents are attached.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: Prospective students will write an entrance assessment focusing on Mathematics and English.

steps.title: Interview
steps.description: Successful candidates and their parents will be invited for an interview with the Headmaster.
